name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling, supporting OGG and M4A formats with smart time-slot management.
overview: Automated online radio streaming to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots. Streaming is active only during scheduled hours.

versions.changelog:
- Removed random music playback entirely; streaming only active during scheduled playlists
- Transmission stops when playlist ends; no music plays outside scheduled hours
- Schedule overlap support: later-starting playlist takes priority and interrupts the earlier one
- Schedule monitoring every 5 seconds during streaming for overlap detection
- Removed non-functional enable/disable checkbox from schedule entries
- Removed footer text and link
- Playlist selection is now required when adding a program
- Removed RandomFillLimit config field

- Fixed native Jellyfin styles in schedule list (all selects now use is="emby-select", checkbox uses is="emby-checkbox")
- Fixed Estado tab now shows correct status using getPluginConfiguration (reads from disk)
- Fixed playlist loading: now loads after config is ready, auto-reloads after save, handles API errors gracefully
- Fixed transmission interruption between songs: now uses FFmpeg concat demuxer for gapless continuous streaming
- Improved API calls using native fetch with Jellyfin auth headers instead of ApiClient.ajax
- Removed conflicting custom CSS for schedule form elements
- Better error handling throughout config page

- Fixed status refresh button now uses ApiClient.ajax
- Added Saturday and Sunday to schedule programming
- Time selectors are now dropdown lists (hours 0-23, minutes in 5-min intervals)
- Fixed playlist order now preserved using LinkedChildren
- Fixed Icecast connection not stopping when plugin is disabled
- Fixed transmission lost between tracks (better reconnection + 1s gap)
- Schedule entries now use Jellyfin listItem style instead of raw table
- Fixed day and playlist selection persistence after save/reload
- Removed weekend restriction from backend schedule manager

- Fixed checkbox overlapping text label
- Removed custom CSS overrides that conflicted with Jellyfin native styles
- Form elements now use Jellyfin native emby-input, emby-select, emby-checkbox styling
- Buttons use Jellyfin native emby-button styling
- Cleaner schedule table and status grid styling

- Fixed blank configuration page (rewrote as single inline div with embedded script)
- Tabbed config dashboard: Configuracion, Programacion, Estado
- Proper Jellyfin localnav tab navigation
- All JavaScript inline (no external script dependencies)
- Stable config load/save via ApiClient
- Schedule CRUD with table editing
- Status monitoring tab with streaming info

- Initial alpha release
- Icecast server streaming support (OGG Vorbis / M4A AAC)
- Weekly schedule programming (Monday-Friday)
- Jellyfin playlist integration
- Smart time-slot management
- Random music fill for unscheduled slots
- Audio bitrate configuration (32-320 kbps)
- Stream metadata (name, description, genre)
